subcodes.first_line: The letter from that handmaiden of God arrived at a time when, owing to the sorrows that had descended, the divine fragrances were cut off and the pen was stilled from motion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه آن امه الله رسید در حینیکه از احزان وارده نفحات الهیه مقطوع و قلم از حرکت
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @role and station of women, @the power of words; of speech, @suffering and imprisonment
